mainEntity.name: Step-by-step schema implementation for Houston lawyers?
mainEntity.text: Step-by-step schema implementation for Houston lawyers?

acceptedAnswer.text: 1. Generate JSON-LD via Merkle tool. 2. Add Attorney/LocalBusiness. 3. Embed Texas geo. 4. Test via Google Structured Data. 5. Monitor Rich Results.

suggestedAnswer.text: Houston schema boosts AI parsing 40%. Include practiceArea like 'oil rig injury.' Validate weekly. Errors tank visibility. Free tools; agencies $500 setup. Essential for map+AI.
